findings.evidence: `rg -n "\bchange\b|\bshow\b" ...` reports only line 279 in the touched file; the surrounding proof then rewrites with `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup_apply_smul` and closes by the private `rfl` lemma `quotientGroup_quotientBot_mk`.
findings.fix: Replace the `change` with a proof through a named simp lemma for `(QuotientGroup.quotientBot ... (QuotientGroup.mk ...))`, or add a short comment explaining why unfolding the equivalence composition is unavoidable here.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquivDeck_apply_smul` starts with an uncommented `change` exposing the `.trans` definition of `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientBotEquivDeck`.

summary: One new proof uses an undocumented `change`, which this rubric treats as brittle definitional-equality manipulation unless justified or avoided.
